name: Feather-Light Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream together the shortening, sugar, and egg.
2. Combine the dry ingredients (cake flour, baking powder, salt, and nutmeg) in a separate bowl.
3. Add the dry mixture to the creamed ingredients, alternating with milk, until just combined.
4. Fill greased muffin tins 2/3 full with the batter.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Let cool in the muffin tins for 3-4 minutes.
7. Meanwhile, mix together the sugar and cinnamon in a separate bowl.
8. Roll warm muffins in melted butter, then coat with the sugar-cinnamon mixture.
9. Serve warm. Yield: 8-10
